title: Guidelines on Insurance Coverage
content: The document titled 'Guidelines on Insurance Coverage' is issued under the authority of Secretary Rosalinda Dimapilis-Baldoz of the Department of Labor and Employment (DOLE), with contributions from Deputy Commissioner Officer-in-Charge, Administrator of the Philippine Overseas Employment Administration (POEA) Jennifer Aardin-Manalili, and Chairman Gerardo Benj Xminc.Nograles. The guidelines pertain to the insurance coverage requirements for overseas Filipino workers and other related labor concerns. Specific provisions, coverage details, and implementation instructions are outlined in the full document.
